mapper.sql: id, llm_id, scenario, model_name, model_api_key, model_base_url, model_temperature, model_max_tokens, model_response_format, is_default, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE llm_config SET model_name = #{modelName}, model_api_key = #{modelApiKey}, model_base_url = #{modelBaseUrl}, model_temperature = #{modelTemperature}, model_max_tokens = #{modelMaxTokens}, model_response_format = #{modelResponseFormat} WHERE llm_id = #{llmId} AND scenario = #{scenario}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM llm_config WHERE llm_id = #{llmId} AND scenario = #{scenario}
